description_long: This is a pair of rugged, high-ankle black boots with a matte, weathered finish, suitable for urban environments. The boots feature a robust construction with thick, textured soles and reinforced toe caps, providing durability and protection. Metal eyelets run up the front, securing black laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, while the tongue and collar are padded for comfort. The stitching along the sides and around the sole is visible, adding to the utilitarian aesthetic. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material, likely for added comfort and insulation. The overall design suggests these boots are intended for heavy-duty use, such as work or outdoor activities in urban settings.
description: A pair of sturdy, black, high-ankle boots with criss-cross lacing, metal eyelets, and a rugged, weathered finish. Designed for durability and comfort in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing both boots upright, highlighting the criss-cross lacing, metal eyelets, and reinforced toe caps.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the thick sole, visible stitching, and the padded collar and tongue.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the high ankle support, back seam, and the slightly scalloped collar edges.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the rugged sole and side stitching details.
